# Copilot Instructions (CAF)

This is a thin shim.

Follow the canonical global agent instructions:
- `.github/AGENT_INSTRUCTIONS.md`

Canonical router skills:
- `skills/caf/SKILL.md` (default) or `skills_portable/caf/SKILL.md` when `tools/caf-state/active_skillpack.json` sets `active_pack` to `portable`
- `skills/caf-meta/SKILL.md`

Optional workspace pointers (thin shims; no mirrors):
- `.copilot/skills/caf/SKILL.md`
- `.copilot/skills/caf-meta/SKILL.md`
